title: parasenecio longispicus
intro: Parasenecio longispicus, also known as Chinese burnet-saxifrage, is a perennial plant species in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Parasenecio longispicus is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
